title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!
